title: Vengeance (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vengeance''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Vengeance]]''''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] used by [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Vengeance (Golthan)|'''''Vengeance''''']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] destroyed in-dock at [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]]
*[[Vengeance (Tatooine)|'''''Vengeance''''']], an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer orbiting [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*[[Vengeance (Imperial-class, Jerec)|'''''Vengeance''''']], an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer commanded by [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] and then-Captain [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]
*'''''[[Vengeance II]]''''', an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer that replaced Jerec's original ''Vengeance'' and was assigned to [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]]
*[[Vengeance (Executor-class)|'''''Vengeance''''']], an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] commanded by Admiral [[Wooyou Senn]]
*[[Vengeance-class dreadnought|'''''Vengeance''-class dreadnought''']], a type of [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaught]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
**[[Vengeance (Vengeance-class)|'''''Vengeance''''']], a ''Vengeance''-class dreadnought used by Jerec as his mobile base of operations
*[[Vengeance (Dreadnaught-class)|'''''Vengeance''''']], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]]
*'''''[[Vengeance Derra IV]]''''', a [[Dwarf Star-class freighter|''Dwarf Star''-class freighter]] under the command of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]
*[[Vengeance (YV-260 light freighter)|'''''Vengeance''''']], a modified [[YV-260 light freighter]] operated by the [[Bomu Clan]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]
*[[Vengeance-class frigate|'''''Vengeance''-class frigate''']], a type of [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]]
*[[Vengeance (Aratech)|'''Vengeance''']], a model of [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] produced by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]]
*[[Vengeance (organization)|'''Vengeance''']], the name of an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] cell acting as an anti-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] terrorist organization during the [[Caamas Document]] crisis
*[[Vengeance (Oovo IV)|'''Vengeance''']], a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] track on [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]]
*[[Vengeance Strike]]
*[[Task Force Vengeance]]
